name: SCC_CreatePowerDeliveryResAC_DIN
title: SCC_CreatePowerDeliveryResAC_DIN
syntax: long SCC_CreatePowerDeliveryResAC_DIN ( byte SessionID[], char ResponseCode[], long NotificationMaxDelay, byte StatusFlags[], char Notification[] )
description: Creates a Power Delivery Response message for sending, using the AC syntax.

parameters.name: SessionID
parameters.description: 8-byte long SessionID of SCC connection, range: 0 - 0xFF FF FF FF FF FF FF FF.

parameters.name: NotificationMaxDelay
parameters.description: Time until the vehicle is expected to react on the notification (for AC_EVSEStatus).

parameters.name: StatusFlags
parameters.description: Flags for AC_EVSEStatus: StatusFlags[0] = PowerSwitchClosed StatusFlags[1] = RCD

parameters.name: Notification
parameters.description: Notification about an action that the charge point wants the vehicle to perform (for AC_EVSEStatus).

return: Time until the vehicle is expected to react on the
availability: CANoe Measurement Setup / CANalyzer Analysis Branch
CANoe Test Setup for Test Modules
CANoe Test Setup for Test Units
